states.name: Sherry
states.title: Chief of the Dandelio Kud
states.description: Sherry is one of the two chiefs of Dandelio, a forest region inhabited by elves and kud. Though young, she is a sharp and fair leader, and also the leading expert on healing techniques and the medicinal herbs that grow in her domain.

states.name: Sherry
states.title: Chief of the Dandelio Kud
states.description: The coexistence of elves and kud in Dandelio began four Pandemoniums ago, when the Dandelio kud sheltered a group of elven refugees. Now, Dandelio is a fully integrated society, and its chiefs, Sherry and Ludorié, work closely together to maintain the peace and prosperity of their homeland.
